- Drushyam 2 (2021, Telugu) — Venkatesh, Meena, Nadhiya, Sampath Raj, Kruthika Jayakumar — remake of the Malayalam original (Wikidata Q105984608)
- Drishyam 2 (2022, Hindi) — Ajay Devgn, Akshaye Khanna, Tabu, Shriya Saran, Ishita Dutta — remake of the Malayalam original (Wikidata Q112665700)
- Drishya 2 (2021, Kannada) — V. Ravichandran, Anant Nag, Asha Sarath, Prabhu, Navya Nair — remake of the Malayalam original (Wikidata Q102036246)
